title: Vivo Technologies 200-Pack of 7-inch Disposable Paper Plates 18cm White 100% Compostable Biodegradable Party Paper Plate Perfect for Everyday use, Ideal for BBQ's, Parties and Events
features: Convenient 7-Inch Size: Ideal for serving appetizers, desserts, and a variety of dishes. These compostable food plates are perfect for parties, daily meals, restaurants, food trucks, to-go orders, and other food service environments.

Eco-Friendly: Made from sustainable and renewable material, these plates are an environmentally conscious choice. They are completely plastic-free, reducing your carbon footprint and promoting a greener lifestyle.

Versatile Use: Suitable for both hot and cold food items, these white paper plates provide reliable strength without plastic or wax lining. They are microwavable and freezable, though hot foods may cause some condensation at the bottom.

100% Compostable: These small paper plates can be commercially composted, reducing waste and benefiting the environment. They meet ASTM D6400 or D6868 standards and are designed to degrade quickly, making cleanup convenient for you, your customers, and the planet.

Perfect for Any Occasion: With their classic design, these disposable plates are suitable for a wide range of events, including camping, picnics, lunches, catering, BBQs, events, parties, weddings, and restaurants.
